mapper.select:
SELECT product_id value, product_name label FROM test_product WHERE is_valid=1
and product_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productName},'%')

SELECT t2.id VALUE, t2.CODE label FROM ( SELECT * FROM test_product_standard_file_rel WHERE product_id = 2549 ) t1 LEFT JOIN test_standard_file t2 ON t1.standard_file_id = t2.id WHERE t2.type IN ( 1 , 3 ) UNION ALL SELECT 0, "客户提供" FROM DUAL
